query:
DELETE FROM users WHERE email = 'olimpoinformatica2016@gmail.com';

INSERT INTO users (
  email,
  openId,
  name,
  role,
  subscriptionStatus,
  currentPlanId,
  subscriptionStartDate,
  subscriptionEndDate,
  stripeCustomerId,
  createdAt,
  updatedAt
) VALUES (
  'olimpoinformatica2016@gmail.com',
  'super_user_openid_001',
  'Super User Olimpo',
  'admin',
  'active',
  'enterprise',
  NOW(),
  DATE_ADD(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 YEAR),
  'cus_super_enterprise',
  NOW(),
  NOW()
);
